content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.89%, Realty +2.21%, Auto +1.16%, Metal +1.31% and PSU Bank +1.11%. India VIX easing to 18.11. Election clarity and Middle-East de-escalation driving risk-on; only IT lagging. Book is well-positioned with 8 of 9 holdings green or near-flat.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24290
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1038.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding +6.9%, SL already at 1038 (above entry, locking ~5.5% gain). CMP 1052 with VWAP 1052 — sitting on VWAP, no impulsive move today. Q4 was strong (PAT +19%, GNPA improved to 0.93%, Rs 8 dividend) but stock +34% in a month and CEO transition overhang remains. SL 1038 is 1.3% below CMP — tight enough to protect gain but with breathing room. No-op MODIFY since values match stored — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1038 already at trail level locking +5.5% gain; target 1110 intact. Letting it run toward R2 1065/target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.9% but recovering today (+1.02%). Hedge function intact — gold long-term thesis unchanged (JPM $5,000+/oz target, INR weakness tailwind). SL 119 (-3% below CMP) appropriate for a hedge sleeve. Risk-on reduces near-term safe-haven bid but corrections are accumulation per ICICIdirect. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.4% unrealized. Stock at 52w high 1841 today, currently 1827. Stored SL 1810 is already above entry 1734 (locks +4.4%) and 0.9% below CMP — too tight, will get whipsawed on normal chop. However, Q4 results May 19-21 is a binary catalyst within the 15-day CNC window. Per Rule 11, default disposition into binary is exit/trim/tighten. Choosing (b): tightening is already in place via stored SL 1810. No-op — converting to HOLD with awareness of binary."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1810 already locks +4.4%. Q4 results May 19-21 — will reassess and likely exit before that print per Rule 11. For now, intact thesis (Organon deal narrative, Macquarie target 2150). Letting it run toward 1880."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 477.50,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.9% unrealized. SL 477.50 is already above entry 469 (locks +1.8%) — appropriate trail. CMP 483.25, SL 1.2% below — adequate gap. Sector ambiguity: Q4 PAT +11% but April production -9.7% YoY is concerning, and FY26 PAT pressured. Letting target 495 (52w high zone) play out. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 477.50 trails +1.8% gain. Target 495 within reach; 52w high 485.70 is immediate resistance."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9% unrealized. SL 23.85 is 1% below CMP 24.10 — locks small gain. ETF benefits from Sun Pharma weight (22%) Organon narrative + sector defensive bid. Letting toward target 25.20."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6% with strong Q4 print (PAT +23%, AUM Rs 5L cr, gold +115%). SL 940 below entry — but only 1.7% below CMP 956.55, tight risk. Letting it work toward target 985. R:R math at entry: per prior tick correction, target 985 with SL 940 gives 41/4 reward/risk on 944 entry = R:R 1.41 — already on the books, monitoring. Will trail SL above entry once +2% threshold hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% unrealized, just entered. Strong Q4 (revenue +26%, cargo crossed 500 MMT first time, dividend Rs 7.50). 23 Buy / 0 Sell consensus, target 1833. SL 1675 (-1.9% below CMP) appropriate. Target 1790 toward 52w high. Letting it develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.1%). Today's intraday weakness (-1.2%) on profit-take after Apr 29 surge to 52w high 1590. Q4 results May 14 = binary catalyst within hold window. Will reassess closer to May 14 per Rule 11. SL 1490 (-3% below CMP) gives breathing room. Tanker upcycle thesis intact, Brent ~$101 supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% unrealized. Auto sector leading (+1.16%); record April sales 2.39 lakh units. Q4 already out (PAT -6.4% but revenue record, Rs 140 dividend). SL 13400 (-2.2% below CMP) appropriate. Stock faded from intraday high 13976 — gap-up sell-off pattern, watching closely. Hold for now, target 14500."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 5,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 10310,
      "stop_loss": 10000,
      "target": 10800,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Auto sector leader (+1.16%); BAJAJ-AUTO +8% on May 6 board meeting catalyst (Q4 results + dividend + buyback consideration — first in 2 years). 2024 buyback was at Rs 10,000; expectations Rs 11,500-13,000. Breakout above prior 52w high 10187. Sized small (5 sh = ~Rs 51,550 = 5.1% capital) given confidence 0.62 and binary May 6 event. SL 10000 = -3.0%, target 10800 = +4.75%, R:R 1.58. Risk budget: 5.1% × 3% = 0.15% portfolio risk — well under 0.5% cap. Note: May 6 is binary event within 2 sessions — sizing as event-trade per Rule 11. Cluster check: only MARUTI in auto already; +BAJAJ-AUTO = 2 names in auto cluster, within limit."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting TODAY — full binary event with no positioning info. P/E 224, +44% in last month, at 52w high. Analyst PT range Rs 115-393 (huge dispersion). Bearish Engulfing on Apr 29. Skip — too late to chase ahead of results."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6% on 8.2x volume but FY26 PAT collapsed -55% YoY, RoE 4.8% below cost of capital. Stock at Rs 210 already above several broker targets (Ambit 130, CLSA 143, Axis 160). Promoter stake-sale overhang (RBI mandate to drop to 26%). Chase risk too high; pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SYNGENE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.47% on Q4 print where PAT actually -19% YoY and FY26 PAT -36% — move is short-cover/relief. CEO transition July 1, FDA Bengaluru VAI lingering, P/E 59.6x on falling earnings. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AMBUJACEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY. ACC sister-co PAT -68% YoY on Iran-war fuel/freight cost pressure — direct read-through warns of weak print. Stock down -2.46% pre-results. Adani group governance overhang. NO new entry into binary event with bearish read-through."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY 5 PM. PE 65 (vs Muthoot 15-17), Bain transition execution risk, Asirvad MFI drag. Skip into binary at premium valuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GODREJPROP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today — binary catalyst, no entry per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KOTAKBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down ~5% on Q4 — falling-knife setup, no entry without confirming reversal candle. Watch for stabilization."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "IT sector red; INFY only modestly green. Sector laggard today, no momentum trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defence cluster — would stack with implicit BHEL theme exposure if added. Pass on cluster discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "FLUOROCHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+11% gap-up on only 0.9x volume — weak conviction on the breakout. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already 47% deployed across diversified single names — adding broad-market ETF on top would be redundant exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1038 already trails +5.5% gain. Target 1110 intact. Watch for break above 1057 R1."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge sleeve, recovering today. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1810 locks +4.4%. Will reassess and likely exit before May 19-21 Q4 binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 477.50 locks +1.8%. Approaching 52w high resistance 485."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 tight trail; ETF working as planned."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 thesis intact. Will trail SL above entry once +2% threshold hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, +0.5%. Letting setup develop toward 1790."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat. May 14 results binary — will reassess approaching that date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-0.7%. Faded from intraday high — watching for downside continuation. SL 13400 firm."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "KOTAKBANK to watch for stabilization candle for dip-buy. SYNGENE post-results to see if Rs 470 holds as base. AMBUJACEM/GODREJPROP/MANAPPURAM/BHEL — wait for results then assess on Day 16. BAJAJ-AUTO May 6 buyback announcement — managing as event trade.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 15: Book is well-positioned with broad rally lifting most names. Total unrealized +Rs 9,960 (+1.0%). Cumulative experiment P&L now +0.88% — recovered from -0.11% trough. Deployed 47% with ample dry powder. Adding small BAJAJ-AUTO event-trade (5.1% size) brings deployed to ~52% — well below 80% soft cap. Two binary catalysts to manage proactively: SUNPHARMA (May 19-21) and GESHIP (May 14). Discipline: did NOT chase BHEL/AMBUJACEM/GODREJPROP/MANAPPURAM same-day-results, did NOT stack defence (HAL+BHEL) per cluster rules, did NOT chase BANDHANBNK above broker targets. Quality over quantity."
}
